*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Burn to Left upper arm / Measures 1.8 cm x 1.2 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serous, light. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 1.8 cm x 1.2 cm x 0.0 cm.
  Wound bed: 65% slough, 35% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — improving.
Plan: Negative pressure wound therapy initiated. Nutritional consult ordered.
